title: GYM FITNESS TRAINER (FULL-TIME / PART-TIME)
description:
We are a Young and Vibrant Boutique Fitness Studio that focuses and specialises in drug-free Men's Fitness & Male Physique Transformations + Development!

ONLY JOIN US IF YOU:

  • Are a MALE. (as we are an All-Male training facility!)
  • Have Personal Gym / Bodybuilding / Weight-Lifting / Muscular-Hypertrophy Training Experience. ( >3 years preferred, Competitive welcomed, if any.)
  • Carry A Decent Physique. (Yes, we care about "practicing what you preach" over here.)
  • Fitness Is Your Lifelong Passion & You Take Pride In Guiding others to reach their goals. (Why are you applying if it's not a passion?)
  • You Want To Earn More, & Advance Your Career. (Take care of our clients, & our Team will take care of you. We don't cap your earnings and potential over here like every other big-box gym. Our Top Coaches here themselves earn up to high 4 to 5-figures per month. Including bonuses, & profit-shares.)

We are STRICTLY SELECTIVE with who we pick, and right now, we are opening up only ONE Full-Time Position. (This only happens because we believe in Quality > Quantity.)

If this speaks to you, send in your CV here or via Email to careers.team.bigbros@gmail.com.

-

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop, assess, and monitor safe and effective training programs for members
  • Educate members on proper training techniques and fitness advice
  • Ensure members are using equipment safely and effectively
  • Conduct individual / group classes (e.g. Weight Training, HIIT/Cardio, etc.)
  • Conduct Online Nutrition Planning/ Scheduling
  • Regularly collaborate with the manager to meet KPI, goals and standards
  • Keep gym in order, adhoc maintenance works

Other Benefits:

  • Employee discounts
  • Flexible schedule
  • 24/7 Gym membership
  • Professional Development (with courses and training opportunities)
  • Promotion to Permanent Employee
  • Training/Diet Coaching & programming from Master Coach

Other Requirements:

  • Driven to help others improve their health & fitness
  • Positive attitude & Passionate character
  • Customer service-oriented and good interpersonal skills
  • Complete In-House Training Course by Head/Senior Coach
  • 1-year coaching experience
  • PT certification (not compulsory, but preferred, if any)

Additional Perks: To give back and motivate you guys' Personal Development!

  • Gym membership
  • Training classes/courses for personal development
  • Diet and training programs for personal development
  • Specialised Training & Workshops by Top Guest Speakers/ Pro-Bodybuilders/ Renowned Fitness Figures/ Gym-fluencer + Networking sessions
  • Company cohesions for all staffs / Bi-Annual Holiday Retreats for Full-Timers


SG/MSIA welcome to apply!

postedCompany.description:
Boutique Gym in Lavender, specialising in Male Fitness/ Physique Transformations.

We are hiring. TY.
